scope.basis: Review request for auth session diff

evidence.summary: remember_me uses the default TTL branch instead of the persistent TTL branch.
Tests cover only default session expiration.

findings.observation: The remember_me branch returns the default TTL instead of the persistent-session TTL.
findings.impact: Users who request a persistent session can be logged out earlier than the product contract describes.
findings.recommendation: Use the persistent-session TTL when remember_me is true and add a regression test for that branch.
findings.false_positive_notes: The changed branch and configured TTL are both in the reviewed scope.

findings.observation: The test file has no assertion for remember_me expiration behavior.
findings.impact: The regression can return because only the default expiration branch is exercised.
findings.recommendation: Add a test that asserts the persistent-session TTL when remember_me is true.
findings.false_positive_notes: The reviewed tests are in scope and target the same session function.

risks: Tests were not executed during review.
